{{Quote|This is the ''Liberator'', sorry we're late.|[[Kole]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''</ref>}}
The '''''Liberator''''' was a [[Mere troop transport]] used by the [[Mere Resistance]] prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

The [[Transport/Legends|transport]] was flown by the [[Chadra-Fan/Legends|Chadra-Fan]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Kole]] during the [[Raid on Spacestation 1138|prison break]] at [[Spacestation 1138]]. Escorted by [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] and [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]], the ''Liberator'' docked at the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] and rescued [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Orsai]] and his [[Gender/Legends|men]], who had fled their cells to rendezvous at the station's docking arm. Pursued by [[Droid starfighter/Legends|droid starfighters]], the ''Liberator'' sped into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], destined for [[Maramere]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]'' {{1st}}
